parsed_review.summary: CP00-525 is a clean, descriptor-only AI governance (RP17) slice pack covering the planned 40 RP17 units RP17.P02.M07.S04-RP17.P02.M08.S18 (M07 Test And Golden Case Set tail: 22 rows; M08 Hermes Evidence Packet head: 18 rows). All eight in-scope implementation refs (contract JSON, README, registry.js, service.js, validators.js, model.test.js, index.js, validator script) are internally consistent. The pack-level production_ready claim is honestly false (status implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout); command-evidence shows all node --check/--test, rp17/rp05-rp15/rp00 validators, npm test/validate/build, and git diff --check at exit 0, with no_real_data=true and writes_product_state=false. Descriptor-only boundaries are enforced in code, tests, and contract: every row carries descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false; the freezeCp525Result attestation sets all runtime-dispatch, state-write, audit-write, object-storage, Hermes-receipt, and leak flags false. Authority boundary holds: authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION.promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; allowed tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob and review-request is read_only. Hermes (H17) appears only as a deterministic descriptor evidence packet (receipt_shape descriptor_only_governance_p02_test_hermes_slice_no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false) — not embedded product runtime. The validator deep-equals the contract against code bindings and asserts the historical ledger tail is CP00-525; deliverable distribution (impl 16, security_audit 4, ui 6, claude_review 3, failure_recovery 4, test 4, fixture 1, hermes_evidence 1, contract 1 = 40) and micro_title split (22/18) match the manifest and baseline. Review-hardening preconditions are satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1448B stdout), no stale/invalid raw-output or receipt artifacts exist to reject, and forbidden_review_evidence is correctly encoded. No P0-P3 findings; pack is ready for the post-review closeout gates.
